meaning: n.菲(涅耳)(频率单位,百亿赫兹)
examples: A method of making the Fresnel lens is described.
Fresnel lens on the top. Thickness and quality of the glass are impressive.
That, Dr Koechlin reckons, gives Fresnel optics a big advantage over Newtonian ones.
Using a Fresnel lens, they were able to snap a photograph of the dark spot left in the atom's wake as the laser passed over it.
